title: Record soft43 async32 and tool3.5k densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft43 Async32 Tool35k Contract

## Soft 43
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.43 so full summaries start earlier under long sessions

## Async 32
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.32 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 3.5k
tool result budgets default to 3500 chars with 60-char previews for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status vitest
